deep_dive.title: Scaling Storm-Resolving Atmospheric AI Simulation to the Entire Planet
deep_dive.abstract: Kilometer-scale convection shapes precipitation extremes, tropical organization, and cloud feedbacks, but most global atmospheric models approximate these processes at 25-100 km resolution. Global storm-resolving physics models resolve convective systems explicitly, but at a cost -- roughly one MWh per simulated day on exascale supercomputers -- that limits long-duration simulation. We introduce STRATA (Storm-resolving Tile-based autoRegressive Atmosphere Transformer Architecture), the first autoregressive AI emulator for global storm-resolving atmospheric dynamics. STRATA is trained on the highest-resolution atmospheric dataset yet used for global AI emulation: 17 days of SCREAM physics-model output at 4.9-km resolution (~25 million grid cells) sampled every 10 minutes. Our central premise is that on 10-minute timescales atmospheric dynamics are predominantly local, so training on small spatial tiles trades scarce global temporal samples for abundant local spatial samples and enables global rollout via overlapping-tile blending. STRATA combines 3D patch embedding and local 3D neighborhood attention, a novel Stereographic Rotary Position Embedding (StereoRoPE) for grid-invariant encoding, and a pixel-space de-aliasing decoder that suppresses patch-scale rollout artifacts. An iso-FLOP scaling study reveals that km-scale emulation requires ~10x more FLOPs per grid point than coarse-resolution AI weather models, consistent with the higher information density of convective-scale dynamics. Trained on only 17 days of data, STRATA produces stable 24-hour global rollouts with realistic km-scale dynamics across diverse regimes, though large-scale biases develop with lead time. It achieves 48 simulation days per megawatt-hour -- about 50 times better energy efficiency than the SCREAM physics model -- and 741 simulated days per wall-clock day at 512 H100 GPUs. Code and dataset are publicly available.
deep_dive.llm_evidence_en: global storm-resolving AI emulator for atmospheric dynamics, applicable to air quality simulation acceleration
deep_dive.llm_evidence_cn: 全球风暴解析AI仿真器，可加速空气质量模拟
deep_dive.llm_evidence: 全球风暴解析AI仿真器，可加速空气质量模拟
deep_dive.canonical_evidence: 全球风暴解析AI仿真器，可加速空气质量模拟
deep_dive.llm_tldr_en: STRATA is an autoregressive AI emulator for global storm-resolving atmospheric dynamics, trained on 4.9-km SCREAM data, offering orders of magnitude speedup.
deep_dive.llm_tldr_cn: 提出STRATA，首个全球风暴解析大气动力学自回归AI仿真器。基于SCREAM物理模型在4.9公里分辨率下的输出训练，能够以极低计算成本模拟全球大气。该模型可直接作为空气质量模型中气象场的快速代理，实现GPU加速模拟。其架构为基于Transformer的自回归设计，支持长时间积分。

deep_dive.title: Fourier Neural Operators for Rayleigh-Bénard Convection
deep_dive.abstract: We propose an improved Fourier Neural Operator (FNO) for modeling two-dimensional Rayleigh-Bénard convection by predicting time increments instead of full solutions, achieving higher accuracy than a standard FNO baseline. The resulting model is compact (314k parameters, 1.26 MB) and fast (7 ms inference), while maintaining similar accuracy as demonstrated in previous benchmarks. We show that although FNOs generalize to finer meshes, accuracy remains limited by the resolution of the training data.
deep_dive.llm_evidence_en: Fourier Neural Operator for convection, similar to neural operator surrogate models
deep_dive.llm_evidence_cn: 傅里叶神经算子用于对流建模，属于神经算子代理模型
deep_dive.llm_evidence: 傅里叶神经算子用于对流建模，属于神经算子代理模型
deep_dive.canonical_evidence: 傅里叶神经算子用于对流建模，属于神经算子代理模型
deep_dive.llm_tldr_en: An improved FNO for Rayleigh-Benard convection predicts time increments, achieving compact, fast inference, directly relevant to neural operator surrogate models.
deep_dive.llm_tldr_cn: 提出改进的傅里叶神经算子（FNO）用于二维瑞利-贝纳德对流建模。通过预测时间增量而非全解，模型精度提升且参数仅31.4万，推理仅需7毫秒。该工作展示了神经算子作为代理模型在流体动力学的应用，可迁移至空气质量模型中的物理过程加速。
deep_dive.llm_tldr: 提出改进的傅里叶神经算子（FNO）用于二维瑞利-贝纳德对流建模。通过预测时间增量而非全解，模型精度提升且参数仅31.4万，推理仅需7毫秒。该工作展示了神经算子作为代理模型在流体动力学的应用，可迁移至空气质量模型中的物理过程加速。

deep_dive.title: From Spectral Methods to Sample Complexity Bounds for Fourier Neural Operators
deep_dive.abstract: We establish approximation and learning guarantees for Fourier neural operators (FNOs) applied to time-$T$ solution operators of dissipative evolution equations. The analysis builds on the premise that FNOs can efficiently approximate and learn solution operators whenever these operators admit stable and accurate spectral discretizations. To formalize this idea, we introduce classes of evolution operators defined through spectral methods and derive FNO approximation bounds and polynomial sample complexity guarantees for these classes. For equations with polynomial nonlinearities, the learning rates depend primarily on the smoothness of the input space and the dimension of the physical domain. Our results hold uniformly over broad families of dissipative equations, rather than for a single fixed PDE, and apply in particular to the Navier--Stokes, Allen--Cahn, and Cahn--Hilliard equations. For equations with non-polynomial smooth nonlinearities, we prove that polynomial sample complexity still holds with rates that now additionally depend on the smoothness of the nonlinear terms and the dissipation strength. Overall, we connect classical spectral approximation theory with modern operator learning and explain when FNOs can learn nonlinear evolution operators efficiently.
deep_dive.llm_evidence_en: Fourier Neural Operators for evolution equations
deep_dive.llm_evidence_cn: 傅里叶神经算子用于演化方程
deep_dive.llm_evidence: 傅里叶神经算子用于演化方程
deep_dive.canonical_evidence: 傅里叶神经算子用于演化方程
deep_dive.llm_tldr_en: Provides approximation and learning guarantees for Fourier Neural Operators (FNOs) applied to dissipative evolution equations, showing that FNOs can efficiently approximate solution operators when spectral discretizations exist. Derives polynomial sample complexity bounds.
deep_dive.llm_tldr_cn: 本文针对耗散演化方程的时间-T解算子，建立了傅里叶神经算子(FNO)的逼近和学习保证。理论分析表明，只要解算子存在稳定且精确的谱离散化，FNO就能高效逼近和学习该算子。文章推导了FNO的逼近误差界和多项式样本复杂度，结果依赖于输入空间的平滑度和物理域维度。该工作为神经算子在科学计算中的应用提供了理论基础。
deep_dive.llm_tldr: 本文针对耗散演化方程的时间-T解算子，建立了傅里叶神经算子(FNO)的逼近和学习保证。理论分析表明，只要解算子存在稳定且精确的谱离散化，FNO就能高效逼近和学习该算子。文章推导了FNO的逼近误差界和多项式样本复杂度，结果依赖于输入空间的平滑度和物理域维度。该工作为神经算子在科学计算中的应用提供了理论基础。

quick_skim.title: RainODE: Continuous-Time Precipitation Forecasting with Latent Neural ODEs
quick_skim.abstract: In precipitation forecasting, not only accuracy but also temporal resolution is critical. However, increasing temporal resolution is constrained by observational limitations and the computational cost of dense discrete modeling. To overcome this limitation, we reformulate precipitation forecasting as a continuous-time dynamical system and propose RainODE, a framework that models precipitation evolution in latent space using a Neural ODE. This formulation enables derivative-consistent temporal dynamics and captures the dominant large-scale advective motion of precipitation systems. Nevertheless, a purely deterministic ODE struggles to represent non-advective intensity changes such as localized growth, decay, and sub-grid variability, often leading to over-smoothed predictions. To address this issue, we introduce a stochastic source modeling module based on a Brownian Bridge formulation, which refines residual intensity variations and restores fine-grained structures while preserving advective consistency. By combining deterministic continuous dynamics with stochastic refinement, RainODE enables arbitrary-time inference while maintaining sharp predictions. Experiments on SEVIR and the newly introduced Radar-based Precipitation Integrated Dataset (RAPID) demonstrate consistent improvements across multiple temporal intervals and precipitation regimes. The code is available at https://github.com/SeongYE/RainODE.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: uses neural ODE for environmental precipitation forecasting; physics-informed machine learning
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 使用神经ODE进行降水预报；物理信息机器学习
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 使用神经ODE进行降水预报；物理信息机器学习
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 使用神经ODE进行降水预报；物理信息机器学习
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: RainODE uses latent neural ODEs for continuous-time precipitation forecasting, capturing advective motion but requiring additional stochasticity for intensity changes.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 本文提出RainODE，在潜在空间使用神经ODE进行连续时间降水预报，解决传统离散模型的时间分辨率限制。该方法能捕捉大尺度平流运动，但对局部强度变化需要随机成分。实验表明在保持高时间分辨率的同时提高了预报精度，为环境建模的物理信息机器学习提供了新范例。

quick_skim.title: Convolutional Symmetric AutoEncoders: enhancing latent stability via differential geometry
quick_skim.abstract: Autoencoders (AEs) have emerged as powerful tools for non-linear dimensionality reduction, often surpassing traditional linear methods such as Proper Orthogonal Decomposition (POD) in scenarios characterized by slowly decaying Kolmogorov $n$-widths. In the realm of Reduced-Order Modelling (ROM), these models are increasingly utilized to learn low-dimensional representations of solution manifolds associated with parametric Partial Differential Equations (PDEs). However, the high expressivity of AEs presents a challenge: although trained networks typically minimize reconstruction error, they often struggle to capture the essential properties necessary for building accurate and robust ROMs. Recent works by arXiv:2307.15288v2 and arXiv:2506.11641v1 have tackled this challenge in fully connected AEs by proposing representation-consistent architectures, which preserve some of the properties belonging to POD. This study builds upon that concept by extending representation consistency for convolutional layers. We introduce a novel class of symmetric Convolutional AutoEncoders (CAEs) designed to embody the primary properties of manifold parametrization mappings. When integrated into a ROM framework, this architecture demonstrates significantly improved predictive capabilities. Specifically, we compared the performance of the ROMs based on classical and symmetric CAEs on three one dimensional academic test cases, namely the Linear Advection, the Viscous Burger and the Kuramoto Sivashinsky equation. Numerical results demonstrate that our proposed symmetric approach consistently yields more accurate latent trajectories, lower reconstruction errors, and enhanced model robustness.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: autoencoders for reduced-order modeling of PDEs; surrogate model for air quality possible
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 自编码器用于PDE降阶建模；可应用于空气质量代理模型
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 自编码器用于PDE降阶建模；可应用于空气质量代理模型
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 自编码器用于PDE降阶建模；可应用于空气质量代理模型
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: Convolutional symmetric autoencoders enhance latent stability for reduced-order modeling of parametric PDEs, improving robustness over standard autoencoders.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 本文提出卷积对称自编码器，通过微分几何增强潜在空间稳定性，用于参数化PDE的降阶建模。传统自编码器虽然能低维表示，但缺乏构建鲁棒ROM的稳定性。新方法在保持低重建误差的同时，显著提升了潜在表示的稳定性和ROM精度，为构建空气质量代理模型提供了有前景的工具。
quick_skim.llm_tldr: 本文提出卷积对称自编码器，通过微分几何增强潜在空间稳定性，用于参数化PDE的降阶建模。传统自编码器虽然能低维表示，但缺乏构建鲁棒ROM的稳定性。新方法在保持低重建误差的同时，显著提升了潜在表示的稳定性和ROM精度，为构建空气质量代理模型提供了有前景的工具。

quick_skim.title: A spectral-subspace-augmented POD-Galerkin method for parametrized PDEs with limited snapshot data
quick_skim.abstract: Parametrized partial differential equations (PDEs) arise in many-query simulation, optimization, control, and uncertainty quantification, where repeated full-order solves restrict the number of high-fidelity snapshots that can be generated. This limitation is particularly pronounced in computational energy science, where multiscale models of porous-media flow, transport, and energy materials often make large snapshot datasets impractical. Proper orthogonal decomposition (POD) constructs compact reduced bases from solution snapshots, but it may exhibit limited out-of-sample predictive capability when the snapshots insufficiently sample the solution manifold. To address this limitation, we propose a spectral-subspace-augmented POD-Galerkin method (SS-POD) tailored to limited-data regimes. SS-POD starts from a problem-adapted spectral approximation space, partitions it into orthogonal subspaces, and performs POD locally on the projected snapshot matrices. An energy-balancing rule determines the spectral partition so that the resulting local POD problems are assigned comparable amounts of snapshot energy. For nonlinear parametrized PDEs, SS-POD is coupled with the discrete empirical interpolation method (DEIM). Numerical experiments show that SS-POD improves out-of-sample accuracy over standard POD-Galerkin while retaining compact reduced bases in limited-snapshot regimes. In particular, for a Laplace-Beltrami problem on the unit sphere with only 5 snapshots, SS-POD achieves a relative error of $3.9*10^{-8}$ using 91 basis functions, whereas the standard POD error saturates at $7.8*10^{-4}$ and the spectral-Galerkin method requires 256 basis functions for comparable accuracy. These results indicate that SS-POD provides an effective strategy for high-fidelity reduced-order modeling from limited snapshot data.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: POD-Galerkin reduced-order model for parametrized PDEs
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 用于参数化PDE的POD-Galerkin降阶模型
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 用于参数化PDE的POD-Galerkin降阶模型
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 用于参数化PDE的POD-Galerkin降阶模型
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: Proposes spectral-subspace-augmented POD-Galerkin method to improve reduced basis accuracy with limited snapshots.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 针对参数化PDE中快照数据有限导致POD降阶模型预测能力下降的问题，提出谱子空间增广POD-Galerkin方法。该方法利用谱信息扩充基函数，在能量科学多尺度模型中验证了改进的外推性能，为替代模型构建提供了新思路。
quick_skim.llm_tldr: 针对参数化PDE中快照数据有限导致POD降阶模型预测能力下降的问题，提出谱子空间增广POD-Galerkin方法。该方法利用谱信息扩充基函数，在能量科学多尺度模型中验证了改进的外推性能，为替代模型构建提供了新思路。

quick_skim.title: Post-Processing Reduced-Order Models for Transport-Dominated Problems by Gegenbauer Reconstruction
quick_skim.abstract: In this paper, we develop a physics-based post-processing technique for data-driven reduced-order models (ROMs) of transport-dominated problems. Besides the slow decay of the Kolmogorov n-width, ROMs based on globally supported bases often produce unphysical oscillations when approximating solutions with shocks or sharp gradients, a phenomenon analogous to Gibbs oscillations in spectral approximations. To address this issue, we introduce a post-processing framework based on Gegenbauer polynomial reconstruction.   The key idea is to re-project the ROM solution onto a Gegenbauer polynomial basis over each interval of analyticity. Originally developed for spectral approximations, Gegenbauer reconstruction achieves spectral accuracy while effectively suppressing Gibbs oscillations. We extend this technique to data-driven ROMs and consider three representative approaches: Proper Orthogonal Decomposition (POD)-Galerkin ROM, Operator Inference (OpInf), and nonlinear manifold ROMs based on convolutional autoencoders (CAE). Numerical results show that the proposed post-processing consistently removes spurious oscillations and substantially improves solution quality for all three ROMs.   For one-dimensional problems, the method is straightforward to implement once discontinuities are detected. We further develop a practical extension to two-dimensional problems using line-by-line reconstruction in each coordinate direction. Extensive numerical experiments demonstrate that the proposed method reduces errors by up to one or two orders of magnitude for inviscid transport problems and significantly outperforms total variation regularization in both numerical accuracy and the sharp resolution of discontinuities.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: post-processing ROM for transport-dominated problems applicable to chemical transport
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 面向传输主导问题的ROM后处理技术，可应用于化学传输模型
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 面向传输主导问题的ROM后处理技术，可应用于化学传输模型
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 面向传输主导问题的ROM后处理技术，可应用于化学传输模型
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: A physics-based post-processing technique using Gegenbauer reconstruction to reduce oscillations in reduced-order models for transport-dominated problems, potentially useful for chemical transport models.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 针对传输主导问题中降阶模型产生的非物理振荡，提出基于Gegenbauer多项式重建的后处理框架。该方法将ROM解重新投影到解析区间上的Gegenbauer多项式基，实现谱精度。虽然不直接针对空气质量，但其处理传输主导问题的思路可迁移至化学传输模型的代理方案中。
quick_skim.llm_tldr: 针对传输主导问题中降阶模型产生的非物理振荡，提出基于Gegenbauer多项式重建的后处理框架。该方法将ROM解重新投影到解析区间上的Gegenbauer多项式基，实现谱精度。虽然不直接针对空气质量，但其处理传输主导问题的思路可迁移至化学传输模型的代理方案中。
